pages.text: The $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() — more sand and sandstone. A vast dune field hiding an oasis.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A sweeping dune field on a much larger scale — and, hidden among the sand, a small $(bold)oasis$().
$(bold)The oasis$()$(br)A little spring-fed pool with sugar cane along its banks breaks up the dunes — a patch of green and water in the desert.
$(bold)Buried bounty$()$(br)More gold in the deep core and larger $(item)bone block$() fossils buried in the sandstone. Over badlands it turns to red sand and red sandstone.
